name: Xnipec Salsa
recipeIngredient: 4 Habanero chiles, seeds and stems removed, diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the diced onion in lime juice for at least 30 minutes.
2. Add all other ingredients to the soaked onion.
3. Mix well.
4. Salt to taste.
5. Serve with grilled fish or grilled chicken.
Caution: Extremely hot!
